name: Check Point Firewall
description: Check Point Security Management Server API for managing access rules, network objects, and security policies

actions.name: Login
actions.description: Authenticate to the Check Point Management Server and obtain a session ID

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Administrator username

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Administrator password

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name for multi-domain environments

actions.name: Show Access Rulebase
actions.description: Retrieve all access rules from a specified access layer

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the access layer to query

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of rules to skip (for pagination)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rules to return (default 50, max 500)

parameters.name: details-level
parameters.description: Detail level: standard, full, or uid

actions.name: Add Access Rule
actions.description: Create a new access control rule in the specified layer

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Name or UID of the access layer

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the rule

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Position of the rule (top, bottom, or number)

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source network object name or Any

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination network object name or Any

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Service or port object name

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Rule action: Accept, Drop, Ask, Inform, Reject

actions.name: Delete Access Rule
actions.description: Delete an existing access control rule

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Name or UID of the access layer

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: UID of the rule to delete

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the rule to delete

parameters.name: rule-number
parameters.description: Rule number to delete

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of hosts to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of hosts to skip

actions.name: Add Host Object
actions.description: Create a new host network object (for IP blocking)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the host object

parameters.name: ip-address
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the host

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: Comments or description for the host object

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of networks to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of networks to skip

actions.name: Show Logs
actions.description: Retrieve security logs from the management server

parameters.name: log-type
parameters.description: Type of log to query (audit, security)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression for log entries

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return

actions.name: Publish Changes
actions.description: Publish pending changes to make them available for policy installation

actions.name: Install Policy
actions.description: Install the security policy on target gateways

parameters.name: policy-package
parameters.description: Name of the policy package to install

parameters.name: targets
parameters.description: List of target gateway names or UIDs
